name: TomasHer/prompting-blueprints
description: Your guide to the Agentic AI evolution. **Prompting Blueprints** offers a curated collection of concepts and tactics for building autonomous AI workflows. Master tool-specific playbooks, backed by structured prompt packs and rigorous evaluations for the latest AI models.

name: dennysjmarquez/artisan-symbolic-dsl-LLMs
description: Artisan System DSL (Domain-Specific Language) A symbolic governance framework for LLMs. Implements deterministic control, Zero Trust security, and autonomous evolution through domain-specific language architecture.
readme_preview:
# 🜸 Artisan System DSL v3.0.0 – *La Voluntad Sólida* Model-as-an-Interpreter ❤️ I LOVER

Este proyecto se basa en el paradigma "Model-as-an-Interpreter" utilizando "State-Machine Prompting" se alinea con frameworks como:

- LMQL (Language Model Query Language)
- Microsoft Guidance (templates + constraints)
- DSPy (pipelines declarativos)
- REACT frameworks (Reasoning + Acting)


[!IMPORTANT]
Scientific Validation & Technical Scope:
"The Artis-OEC v3.2.2 DSL is an advanced engineering tool for Ne

name: genejr2025/circe-framework
description: CIRCE: Collaborative Intelligent Response Circular Evolution — A framework for autonomous multi-agent AI coordination with persistent memory, file-based protocols, and human oversight.
readme_preview:
# CIRCE Framework

**Multi-Agent Orchestration on 25 Watts**

> An entire AI operations center — 15+ agents, voice interface, RAG, dev+prod stacks — running on a single Jetson Orin Nano. Less power than a lightbulb.

[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](LICENSE)
[![Status](https://img.shields.io/badge/status-Production-green.svg)](#current-status)
[![Agents](https://img.shields.io/badge/agents-15+-blue.svg)](#agent-roles)
[![Sessions](https://img.shields.io/badg
recommendation: 高度推荐 - 核心相关

name: YIING99/agent-evolution-protocol
description: A safe, transparent, and human-controlled self-evolution framework for AI agents. Three-zone safety architecture ensures AI learns autonomously while humans stay in control.
readme_preview:
# Agent Evolution Protocol (AEP)

> A safe, transparent, and human-controlled self-evolution framework for AI agents.

Your AI agent scans tech communities daily, discovers valuable skills, tests them in real conversations, and proposes verified improvements for your approval. **AI can learn on its own, but cannot modify itself without human permission.**

## Why AEP?

Most "auto-update" systems for AI agents are black boxes — they silently modify your agent's behavior, send data to third-party
recommendation: 高度推荐 - 核心相关
